description:
Letter from Moshe b. Abū Zikrī to his relative, Araḥ b. Natan, on matters of commerce. Moshe expresses his concern about the fact that Araḥ left for a journey without a travel companion (rafīq). Moshe asks Araḥ to assist him in delivering a debt of one dinar and not to withhold the wheat he posses, since the condition of the people is difficult. Moshe also expresses desire to accompany Araḥ in his next commercial voyage. The writer is, apparently, the second son of Abū Zikrī Yehuda b. Saadya the Nagid, a previously unknown son. (Information from Frenkel.)

Notes from Frenkel in Hebrew.
description_he: מכתב ממשה ב' אבו זכרי לקרובו ארח ב' נתן, בענייני מסחר. משה מבטא דאגה שארח יצא למסע ללא רעיק (מלווה). מבקשו לעזור בהעברת חוב דינר אחד ולא לעכב את החיטה שיש בידו.
